author: SantiMod
content: Hello everyone. Join Today at 12pm PT, our Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner for a deep dive into the metaverse future at the Crypto & Blockchain Conference hosted by Crowdcreate. Register now to get a limited free space. → https://crowdcreate.us/crypto-conference https://twitter.com/staratlas/status/1394675256565149699?s=20
